negative_variants.description: File Fscanf Multi Column Profile: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
File Fscanf Multi Column Profile: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
File Fscanf Multi Column Profile: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
File Fscanf Multi Column Profile: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
File Fscanf Multi Column Profile: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
